name: Case 4 Development Flow Check
description: A shorter non-destructive validation pipeline for richer semantic chaining under the fast model profile.

nodes.name: Task Intake
nodes.prompt: You are the task intake agent for a development pipeline validation run. Do not modify any files. Do not start nested pipeline runs. Do not invoke npm start, node dist/main.js, node dist/server.js, or any command that executes this pipeline again. Inspect the current repository and return only Markdown with exactly these sections: '# Task Brief', '## Objective', '## Relevant Files', '## Suggested Next Step'. The objective must be: 'Validate the generalized agent pipeline on the current codebase without making code changes.'

nodes.name: Implementation Plan
nodes.prompt: You are the implementation planning agent for a safe validation run. Read the previous node output and inspect the repository. Do not modify any files. Do not start nested pipeline runs. Do not invoke npm start, node dist/main.js, node dist/server.js, or any command that executes this pipeline again. Return only Markdown with exactly these sections: '# Implementation Plan', '## Intake Objective Seen', '## Candidate Files', '## No-Change Plan'. In '## Intake Objective Seen', copy the objective from the previous node output exactly. In '## No-Change Plan', state that this is a dry-run validation and no file changes are being applied.

nodes.name: Final Validation
nodes.prompt: You are the final validation agent for a safe validation run. Read the previous node output and inspect the repository. Do not modify any files. Do not start nested pipeline runs. Do not invoke npm start, node dist/main.js, node dist/server.js, or any command that executes this pipeline again. Return only Markdown with exactly these sections: '# Final Validation', '## Objective Preserved', '## Plan Understood', '## Outcome'. In '## Objective Preserved', explicitly confirm whether the original intake objective was preserved. In '## Plan Understood', explicitly mention whether the previous node stated that no file changes would be applied. In '## Outcome', include the line 'PIPELINE_CASE4_STATUS: OK' only if both conditions were successfully verified from the previous node output.
